cards.front: What is Greedy Best First Search?
cards.back: A heuristic search algorithm that explores the node with the highest estimated value or the lowest cost first

cards.front: What is the primary goal of Greedy Best First Search?
cards.back: To find the shortest path or the path with the lowest cost to the goal node

cards.front: What is the key characteristic of Greedy Best First Search?
cards.back: It makes the locally optimal choice at each node, hoping that this choice will lead to a global optimum

cards.front: What is the main disadvantage of Greedy Best First Search?
cards.back: It may get stuck in local optima if the heuristic function is not good or if the search space is very large

cards.front: Is Greedy Best First Search suitable for solving NP-hard problems?
cards.back: No, it is not suitable for solving NP-hard problems due to its high computational complexity
